cmd: import shutil, os; d=os.path.expanduser('~/Programming/PseudoCoup_v0/DevComms/hostruns/results'); dst=d+'/226_bundle'; shutil.copytree('app/build/walks/bundle', dst, dirs_exist_ok=True); shutil.copy('app/build/walks/kt_walk.json', d+'/226_kt_walk.json'); shutil.copy('app/build/walks/kt_activations.log', d+'/226_kt_activations.log'); n=len(os.listdir(dst+'/screenshots')) if os.path.isdir(dst+'/screenshots') else 0; print('captured bundle:', n, 'screenshots')
